short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course

requirements_of_entry.label: Requirements of Entry
value: Introduction to Object Oriented Programming (or equivalent)
This course is only available to Honours students.

co_requisites.label: Co-requisites
co_requisites.value:
Systems Programming (H) (required)
Operating Systems (H) (recommended and optional).

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions
timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.value: Two one-hour lectures and one one-hour tutorial per week.

course_aims.label: Course Aims

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

formative_assessment_feedback.label: Formative Assessment & Feedback
formative_assessment_feedback.value: Laboratory work will be completed in stages, with lecturers and demonstrators providing feedback on each stage during the following laboratory session.
